verdict_reason: The disagreement on 'veda na caiva kaścit' surfaces the substantive doctrinal axis between the strong-negative reading (Prabhupada/Mukundananda: cannot understand at all) and the descriptive reading (Shankara: durvijñeya, hard to know — descriptive not discouraging; Ramanuja: knowing is the rare final link in a four-step chain). The explanation names what is at stake: whether the verse is hopeless (no one knows) or honest (knowing is not produced by hearing). This distinction is doctrinally consequential — it is the difference between despair and humility.
